ddls:
CREATE TABLE "roadside_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roadside event */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the event occurred */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the event occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event (e.g., road, intersection) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., accident, inspection, incident) */,
  "severity" REAL /* Severity of the event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the event occurred */,
  "road_id" INTEGER /* ID of the road where the event occurred */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle involved in the event */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the event */,
  "lighting_conditions" TEXT /* Lighting conditions at the time of the event */,
  "number_of_vehicles_involved" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles involved in the event */,
  "number_of_injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries */,
  "number_of_fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Entity that reported the event */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the event data (e.g., camera, sensor, manual report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roadside_events_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roadside_events_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES event_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roadside_events_severity FOREIGN KEY ("severity") REFERENCES severity_levels ("severity_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., Accident, Inspection) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the event type belongs */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon representing the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Main St and Oak Ave) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "severity_levels" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visual representation in reports */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roadside_event_violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the roadside event */,
  "violation_type" TEXT /* Type of violation (e.g., speeding, reckless driving) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the violation */,
  "fine_amount" REAL /* Fine amount associated with the violation */,
  "enforcement_agency" TEXT /* Agency that enforced the violation */,
  "violation_status" TEXT /* Status of the violation (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roadside_event_violations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES roadside_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, law enforcement) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Active status of the user (e.g., true, false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the roadside event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the event */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the event */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES roadside_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "severity_weights" (
  "weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight */,
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the severity level */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the severity level */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the severity weight is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_severity_weights_severity_id FOREIGN KEY ("severity_id") REFERENCES severity_levels ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "non_sms_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the roadside event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the event occurred */,
  "road_id" INTEGER /* ID of the road where the event occurred */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle involved in the event */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the event */,
  "lighting_conditions" TEXT /* Lighting conditions at the time of the event */,
  "number_of_vehicles_involved" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles involved in the event */,
  "number_of_injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries */,
  "number_of_fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Entity that reported the event */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the event data (e.g., camera, sensor, manual report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_non_sms_events_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name")
)
